notes: Searched filesystem unnecessarily before asking — 6 tool calls vs 3 with skill
Eval 3 (missing input) passes 100% in both configs — correct safety behaviour but non-discriminating; consider replacing with a harder input-handling test
Skill's primary value is schema consistency: without-skill runs used custom JSON incompatible with downstream S2/S3/S4 skills
NEEDS_REVIEW flagging is a clear skill win — 5 spec gaps in UART and 9 in AXI DMA were surfaced that would have been silent omissions without the skill
Skill adds ~22s and ~4570 tokens — cost of the 5-step structured process; justified by downstream interoperability
Without-skill outputs are content-rich but structurally unpredictable; skill enforces the exact 11-section format every time
